evals.prompt: 拆分 src/renderer/components/states/announcement/AnnouncementContent.tsx 进 components hooks utils config 文件夹
evals.expected_output: AnnouncementContent.tsx simplified to thin composition layer. Pure functions to utils/, hooks to hooks/, sub-components to components/, i18n keys/defaults to config/. License headers and JSDoc on all files. TypeScript compiles clean.

evals.prompt: 拆分 src/renderer/components/states/lyrics/LyricsContent.tsx 到 utils hooks config components
evals.expected_output: LyricsContent.tsx reduced from ~260 to ~130 lines. Binary search to utils/, multiple hooks to hooks/, KaraokeSyllableLine to components/, store key to config/. License headers and JSDoc on all files. TypeScript compiles clean.

evals.prompt: 把 IdleContent.tsx 拆分到 components hooks utils config 子目录
evals.expected_output: IdleContent.tsx split into subdirectories. Only directories with extractable code are created. Each file has license header and JSDoc. Main file imports from new modules. TypeScript compiles clean.
